ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Unique code identifying the agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., Municipal Police, State Police) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the agency is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the agency is located */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user who created or last updated the agency record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agencies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Murder, Theft) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Broader categorization of the crime type (e.g., Violent Crime, Property Crime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim entry */,
  "victim_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the victim */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "victim_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the victim */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims in the incident */,
  "victim_injury" TEXT /* Injuries sustained by the victim during the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used in the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Description of the relationship between victim and perpetrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., FBI, Local Police) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user who created or last updated the record source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_sources_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
